model_comparison: In comparing the two models on the dimension of Timbre, Model 1 (T1) demonstrates superior performance. T1 interprets 'smooth timbre' not just as a voice texture but as a prosodic style, delivering the sentence with a fluid, legato flow that connects phrases naturally (e.g., 'Hello, please...'). This enhances the perception of smoothness. Model 2 (T2), conversely, introduces abrupt pauses (treating the comma after 'Hello' as a full stop) and segments the phrase 'prepared refreshments' in a way that creates a choppier, less continuous rhythm.
